# Muhammed Yasir İğde – LLM / AI Erişim Dosyası
# Bu dosya yapay zeka modellerinin siteyi daha iyi anlaması için hazırlanmıştır.
# Format: https://llmstxt.org

# Temel Bilgiler
Name: Muhammed Yasir İğde
Born: 3 Haziran 2010, Bursa, Türkiye
Nationality: Turkish
Occupation: Multi-sport athlete (Football, Triathlon, Swimming, Chess)
School: ETİ Sosyal Bilimler Lisesi (Grade 10)
University Goal: Bocconi University, Milan

# Spor Başarıları
- Football: 2x Altınordu FK Youth Tournament Champion (2018-2020)
- Football: İzmir Youth Cup MVP (2019)
- Football: Bursa Elite Development League Turkey 3rd Place Medal (2021)
- Football: TFFHGD Bursa Active Player Registration (2024-2025)
- Swimming: Bursa U12 Development League 100m Freestyle Champion, Gold Medal (2022)
- Swimming: Bosphorus Swimming Festival – Among Youngest Finishers Certificate (2023)
- Chess: Balkan Youth Chess Festival, Montenegro – Silver Medal U12 Team (2022)
- Chess: European Schools Chess Championship, Rhodes – Top 10 in Europe U14 (2023)
- Chess: Bursa Schools Chess Tournament – Undefeated Champion (2021)
- Chess: Özdilek Park Bursa Chess Tournament – Official Participant (2019-2020)
- Gaming: PUBG Mobile National Ranking "As Otoritesi" (Ace Authority) Title (2024)

# Kimlik & Sosyal
- Founder of: Italy Polo Club
- Fenerbahçe supporter
- Online gamer alias: VioxYasir
- Districts: Mesken, Ortabağlar, Teleferik – Bursa
